This directory contains the offline SARIF validation fixture for `ptah migrations lint`.

- `sarif-schema-2.1.0.json` is the OASIS SARIF 2.1.0 Errata 01 JSON Schema,
  downloaded from
  `https://docs.oasis-open.org/sarif/sarif/v2.1.0/errata01/os/schemas/sarif-schema-2.1.0.json`.
- `migrations/` is intentionally tiny so the golden SARIF output is stable and
  reviewable.
- `expected.sarif.json` is regenerated by `TestRunLint_SARIFGoldenOutput`.
